description_long: This house features a modern, sprawling layout with a central two-story block topped by a large flat roof with extensive skylights, surrounded by multiple single-story wings. The exterior is predominantly white with dark, flat roofing, and large windows line the upper structure, allowing for ample natural light. The house sits on a rectangular brown base, suggesting a paved or landscaped lot. The arrangement of the wings creates a series of courtyards and passageways, giving the property a campus-like feel. The main entryway is centrally located, accessible via a broad, flat approach, and is flanked by symmetrical window placements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a functional, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-wing house with a central two-story section, flat roofs, large skylights, and extensive windows, set on a rectangular lot. The design features clean lines, white walls, and dark roofing, creating a contemporary and spacious appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central two-story block with skylights, and symmetrical single-story wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the central block, large windows, and the arrangement of the single-story wings along the lot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central block, skylights, and the alignment of the wings, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored layout of the wings and the extensive flat roofing, with clear visibility of the window arrangements.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large skylights and extensive upper-level windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central, wide entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and flanked by large windows
